title: Key Derivation, HKDF, and Key Separation · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible labeled key schedule and derivation tree with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in labeled key schedule and derivation tree and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Distinguish extraction, expansion, password stretching, entropy concentration limits, and deterministic key schedules.
Apply HKDF extract and expand with supported hashes, salt, labeled info, bounded output, and one-way key schedule ownership.
Derive independent role, direction, epoch, algorithm, and purpose keys from a versioned hierarchy without key cycles.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Kdf Purpose
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 6407 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive bounded purpose- and role-separated HKDF keys bound to the negotiated transcript; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish extraction, expansion, password stretching, entropy concentration limits, and deterministic key schedules.

Inspect the Crypto Go Kdf Purpose trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
